\tzpentry{ID11376}{FQT Metric Product Carrier}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
The FQT metric carrier is the tensor product of Fisher, quantum, and topological metric carriers.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
g^{\mathrm{FQT}}=g^{\mathrm{Fisher}}\otimes g^{\mathrm{Quantum}}\otimes g^{\mathrm{Topological}}
